name: AREthSetData
title: AREthSetData
syntax: long AREthSetData( dword messageHandle, dword dataLength, char data[] ); // form 1
long AREthSetData( dword messageHandle, dword dataLength, byte data[] ); // form 2
long AREthSetData( dword messageHandle, dword dataLength, struct data ); // from 3
description: This function can be used to set the payload of a SOME/IP message. If data in the payload of the message already exist, the data will be overwritten with this function call.
If necessary the length field in the SOME/IP Message Header will be adapted at the function call.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the received SOME/IP message (see OnAREthMessage)

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Data that should be copied to the SOME/IP message

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
